scripts.dev: npm run build -w @qach/contracts && concurrently -n contracts,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @qach/contracts" "npm run start:dev -w @qach/api" "npm run dev -w @qach/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @qach/contracts && npm run build -w @qach/api && npm run build -w @qach/web
